statusCode.title: Status code
statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the scrape request. 200 = review found.

statusMessage.title: Status message
statusMessage.description: FOUND for valid reviews. NO_REVIEWS_PENALTY_x for empty filter combinations.

asin.title: ASIN
asin.description: Amazon Standard Identification Number of the product.

productTitle.title: Product title
productTitle.description: Full title of the Amazon product.

domainCode.title: Domain
domainCode.description: Amazon marketplace domain code (com, de, co.uk, etc.).

currentPage.title: Page
currentPage.description: Review page number this record was scraped from.

sortStrategy.title: Sort strategy
sortStrategy.description: Sort order used when fetching reviews (recent or helpful).

countReviews.title: Review count
countReviews.description: Total number of reviews on the product page.

countRatings.title: Rating count
countRatings.description: Total number of ratings on the product page.

productRating.title: Product rating
productRating.description: Aggregate star rating shown on the product page.

text.title: Review text
text.description: Full body text of the review.
text.example: Solid build quality. Works exactly as described.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Star rating given by the reviewer.

date.title: Review date
date.description: Date the review was posted, as displayed on Amazon.
date.example: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2025

numberOfHelpful.title: Helpful votes
numberOfHelpful.description: Number of people who found this review helpful.

variationId.title: Variation ASIN
variationId.description: ASIN of the specific product variant the reviewer purchased.

variationList.title: Variation attributes
variationList.description: List of variation attribute strings (e.g. color, size).

imageUrlList.title: Review images
imageUrlList.description: List of image URLs attached to the review.

videoUrlList.title: Review videos
videoUrlList.description: List of video URLs attached to the review.

verified.title: Verified purchase
verified.description: True if the reviewer is a verified purchaser of the product.

vine.title: Vine review
vine.description: True if the review was submitted through the Amazon Vine program.

profilePath.title: Reviewer profile path
profilePath.description: Relative URL path to the reviewer's Amazon profile.
